upasarga_meanings.meaning: samApta karanA nivAraRa karanA spazwa karanA yA honA

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'kAmaM tu me mArutastatra vAsaH prakrIqitAyA vivfRotu deva' (BA0 Adi0 7141) vivfRotu apasArayatu vivfRotirmuKyayA vfttyA''varaRApasAraRe vartate gORyA tvapasAraRamAtre
'jyotizA vi tamo vavarTa' (f0 19122) vivarTa vivavariTa prakASayAmAsiTa dUraM cakarTetyAha
'vi no rAye duro vfDi' (f0 9453) vivfDi=vivfRu udGAwaya
'nAkAraRaM vivfRuyAtKaqgam' (va0 saM0 506) nizkozaM kuryAt nagnaM kuryAditi tu padArTaH
'aBiprAyasya pApatvAnnEvaM tu vivfRomyaham' (BA0 Adi0 14216) vivfRomi vyaktayAmi
'vasanasyeva cCidrARi sADUnAM vivfRoti yaH' (BA0 vana0 )
'tasyEza AtmA vivfRute tanUM svAm' (kaWa0 u0 1223) ukto'rTaH
'SravaRakawu nfpARAmekavAkyaM vivavruH' (raGu0 685) vyaktayAmAsuH udAjahrurityarTaH
'yasmE munirbrahma paraM vivavre' (mahAvIra0 243) vivavre vyAcacakze upadideSa
'aNgulyA maDye vivfRoti' (kA0 SrO0 7718) vivaraM karotItyarTaH
'diSi diSi nirapekzastAvakInaM vivfRvan' (parimalam) (BAminI0 15) vivfRvan vistArayan praTayan prasArayan
'svajanasya hi duHKamagrato vivftadvAramivopajAyate' (ku0 426) vivftam udGAwitam
'jYAtAsvAdo vivftajaGanAM ko vihAtuM samarTaH' (meGa0 43) vivftamanAvftaM jaGanaM sakTi yasyAstAm
'na vivfto madano na ca saMvftaH' (SA0 212) vivfto vyaktIkftaH
'vipannAste'dya vasuDAM vivftAmaDiSerate' (BA0 strI0 1631) vivftA'nAvftA'vyavahitA
'taTA tEravakIrRasya divyErastrEH samantataH na tasya dvyaNgulamapi vivftaM sampradfSyate' (BA0 vi0 6367).. vivftamasaMvftamanAkIrRam
'avivftaScarAmi' (BA0 pu0 51215) pracCanno'varudDa ityarTaH
'ekAgraH syAdavivfto nityaM vivaradarSakaH' (BA0 Adi0 14018) avivfto guptANgaH
'vivftasnAnaH' (pA0 gf0 27) sarvasya prakASaM snAnaM yasya saH
'na cEnAM vivftAM prekzeta' (kA0 saM0 vimAna0 Sizya0 8) vivftAM nagnAm
'vivfta iva niruktaH' (BA0 pu0 121124) vivfto vyAKyAto vyaktatAM nItaH
'na hi Saknomi vivfte pratyAKyAtuM narADipam' (BA0 vi0 1320) vivfte prakASe sarvajanasamakzam
'vivftya nayane krudDa idaM vacanamabravIt' (BA0 Adi0 1639) vivftya visPArya
'vAtopi niScaraMstatra praveSe vinivAryate' (BA0 Adi0 4232) vinivAryate pratiziDyate apArTako viH nistu nizeDasya dyotakaH
'tatkarma kftvA vinivArya BUyaH' (SvetA0 u0 63) vinivArya pratyavekzaRaM kftveti SaNkaraH
